speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . Do you exchange foreign money here ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . Our bank is authorized to deal with foreign exchange .

speaker: speaker2
text: What kinds of currency do you change ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We can change only three kinds of currency , USD , Japanese Yen and HK Dollar in our savings office .

speaker: speaker2
text: Could you tell me what the exchange rate for USD is today ?

speaker: speaker1
text: The buying rate is 826 . 44 yuan for 100 dollars .

speaker: speaker2
text: I want to change some Us dollars to cover my expense here .

speaker: speaker1
text: Please go to Counter No . 2 , the foreign exchange counter . It's over there .
